sizing_rule.note: Allocate capital across multiple market systems using optimal f per system; adjust allocation percentages based on portfolio correlation to maximize geometric mean. Example: $5,000 optimal f per system × 2 systems = 1 contract per $10,000 equity at 50% allocation each.

source_rule_text: Allocate capital across multiple market systems based on optimal f values, adjusting for portfolio correlation to maximize geometric mean
